name: Andrew Nixdorf
summary: SDET at Zywave by day, edge-AI tinkerer by night. I build on NVIDIA Jetson and Ollama, ship with Playwright and Docker, and organize the /dev/reno developer community in Reno, NV.

projects.title: OpenClaw Jetson
projects.description: Secure OpenClaw + Ollama devcontainer for NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano Super. Cloudflare Tunnel ingress, one-command bootstrap.

projects.title: Jetson AI App
projects.description: Jetson AI application with CSI camera integration for real-time computer vision on the edge.

projects.title: Yahboom Orin Case
projects.description: Easy setup for Yahboom CubeNano aluminum case (OLED, RGB, fan) on Jetson Orin Nano. Plug-and-play I2C scripts.

projects.title: /dev/reno
projects.description: Static site for the /dev/reno developer community — monthly lightning talks and networking in Reno, NV.

experience.title: Lead SDET
highlights: Built test automation solutions using Java, JavaScript, Selenium, and Playwright
Designed load testing strategies for high-traffic insurance platforms
Prototyping edge-AI workflows on NVIDIA Jetson for on-device QA tooling
Leading QA transformation initiatives and mentored junior SDETs
Architected CI/CD pipelines and Docker-based testing environments on AWS

experience.title: Lead Organizer
highlights: Coordinate developer community in Reno, NV and promote networking events
Manage speaker outreach and build relationships
Hosted workshops and shared key skills about software engineering and testing

experience.title: Senior Software Testing Engineer
highlights: Specialized in automation and performance testing frameworks
Developed testing infrastructure and CI/CD pipeline integrations
Built comprehensive QA automation frameworks across multiple platforms
Led testing initiatives for various technical products and services

meta.title: Andrew Nixdorf — SDET • Edge AI • DevSecOps
meta.description: SDET at Zywave. Edge AI tinkerer (NVIDIA Jetson, Ollama). Playwright, Docker, AWS, Terraform. /dev/reno community organizer.
